title: schoenus calcatus
intro: Schoenus calcatus, also known as saltmarsh club-rush, is a perennial wetland plant species native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. The health benefits of Schoenus calcatus include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
